edge_a.snippet: Morgan led the Warrior's Sons of Oldtown in surrounding the Starry Sept to protect the High Septon.

edge_b.snippet: Morgan's pardon led to the suspicion that he had murdered the High Septon at the behest of his lordly brother

note: Prose says Morgan surrounded Starry Sept to PROTECT High Septon, but also says he is suspected of murdering him. Emitted PROTECTS (tier-1 explicit); KILLS was not emitted (tier-3 in-universe suspicion only, not confirmed). Human review needed.
